sandbox_detonation.description: Full sandbox file detonation via soc-detonate-file. Cortex Core hash prevalence runs regardless as the free baseline. Enable after configuring WildFire, VirusTotal, or another sandbox integration.

email_authentication.description: SPF/DKIM/DMARC header validation via CheckEmailAuthenticity. Enable when the email source provides raw headers in alert data (Exchange, Gmail, user-reported phishing flow). Not applicable for SEG-only deployments without header data.

email_header_scoring.description: Parse mail infrastructure security scoring headers for supplemental spam and phishing signals. Currently supports Microsoft Exchange/O365 (SCL/BCL/PCL). Enable for Exchange or O365 environments where email headers are available.

email_process_original.description: Retrieve and parse original email content via Process Email - Generic v2. Enable when analysts forward suspicious emails to a monitored phishing mailbox. Provides email body, headers, and attachments for ML and auth analysis.

email_indicator_hunting.description: Cross-platform indicator hunting for phishing IOCs. Enable when a hunting-capable platform is connected (e.g., Microsoft Defender 365). Expensive — runs per alert and queries connected platforms for all extracted IOCs.

email_phishing_ml.description: ML-based phishing content scoring via Phishing - Machine Learning Analysis. Enable after deploying a Phishing ML model. Requires email body content from email_process_original or direct alert body fields. Note: not available in XSIAM — XSOAR deployments only.
